name: recoil_app_mfc_ole_module_constructor
description: RecoilApp::MfcOleModuleConstructor builds the MFC/OLE app base, initializes state-queue runtime fields, installs the MFC/OLE module vtable, and clears the state stack.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 113 unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 138 bytes and the VC object body is 112 bytes with 12 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The byte drift starts at the function entry and constructor-provider call shape: the original calls CWinApp::CWinApp directly with a null name argument, while the current VC object emits different setup around the provider constructor.

The native smoke verifies the returned this pointer, installed g_RecoilApp_MfcOleModule vtable, pending/current/skip-wait fields, state-queue zeroed tail, preserved ctor tag high byte behavior, and cleared state stack.
